data.body: CHECKPOINT: Implementation complete. Added Step 5.5 RED-before-fix Gate to SKILL.md between Step 5 and Step 6. Gate: blocks Edit/Write/fix dispatch without confirmed failing RED test, exempts mechanical bugs. All 48 tests in test_fix_bug_skill.py pass (5 new + 43 pre-existing). AC check: (1) gate blocks fix implementation when no RED test confirmed - PASS; (2) mechanical bugs exempt via Mechanical Fix Path - PASS; (3) unit tests written and passing - PASS.
